creator: danmcgrath.ca@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Just ran into a bit of a build depends failure from the 2019Q2 branch of ports trying to get ghostscript9-agpl-base to compile:

  ===>   ghostscript9-agpl-base-9.27 depends on package: jbig2dec>=0.16 - not found
  ===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/jbig2dec-0.15.txz
  [pkg.blender.org] Installing jbig2dec-0.15...
  [pkg.blender.org] `-- Installing png-1.6.36...
  [pkg.blender.org] `-- Extracting png-1.6.36: .......... done
  [pkg.blender.org] Extracting jbig2dec-0.15: .......... done
  ===>   ghostscript9-agpl-base-9.27 depends on package: jbig2dec>=0.16 - not found
  *** Error code 1

Not exactly sure why it installs 0.15, but then has a check for >= 0.16. Any ideas?
